settings.heading: Made to last.
settings.intro: Shop custom tumblers by size or decoration style, then personalize your favorite with a name, logo or design.
settings.custom_text: Pick the size, color and decoration style that fit what you have in mind. You will receive a digital proof before we make it.
settings.size_intro: Know the size you want? Jump straight to it. Every size stays on this page until you choose a product.
settings.help_heading: Still not sure where to start?
settings.help_text: Tell Dana what you have in mind and we will point you in the right direction.

settings.title: 20 oz Skinny
settings.description: Shop personalized 20 oz skinny tumblers or start with a blank tumbler and create your own design.

settings.title: 22 oz Skinny
settings.short_text: Slim, useful and easy to carry.
settings.description: Browse personalized 22 oz tumblers with laser engraving or vibrant full-color printing.

settings.title: 30 oz Tumbler
settings.description: Shop custom 30 oz tumblers for work, travel and everyday use.

settings.title: 40 oz Tumbler
settings.short_text: Built for long days and fewer refills.
settings.description: Browse large personalized 40 oz tumblers made for long days and fewer refills.

settings.title: 40 oz Tumbler with Handle
settings.short_text: Big capacity with a comfortable handle.
settings.description: Handled tumblers are available with permanent laser engraving for names, logos and simple artwork.

settings.title: Water Bottles
settings.short_text: Made for school, sports and everyday use.
